name: presence
title: usePresence
description: Hook for animating mount/unmount transitions with CSS animations — keeps element in DOM during exit animation, removes after completion.

content.text: Intentional "adjust state during render" pattern supported by React 19:
synchronously sync phase with the `open` prop before commit.

docs.description: Hook for animating mount/unmount transitions with CSS animations — keeps element in DOM during exit animation, removes after completion.

parameters.name: open
parameters.description: Whether the content should be visible. When true, mounts immediately. When false, keeps mounted until exit animation completes via onAnimationEnd.

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: Ref to the animated element. When provided, filters bubbling animationend events from child elements. Recommended when the animated element has children with their own CSS animations.

returns.type: { present: boolean; exiting: boolean; onAnimationEnd: (e: AnimationEvent) => void }
returns.description: Object with present flag for conditional rendering and onAnimationEnd callback for the animated element.

properties.name: present
properties.description: Whether the element should be in the DOM. Use this for conditional rendering.

properties.name: exiting
properties.description: True during the closing animation phase, after present becomes false but before onAnimationEnd is called.

properties.name: onAnimationEnd
properties.description: Callback to attach to the animated element's onAnimationEnd. Filters bubbling events from children — only reacts to animations on the ref element itself.

notes.title: State machine
notes.content: Uses a three-phase state machine (hidden → open → closing → hidden). Phase transitions happen synchronously during render to ensure the element is in the DOM before any useLayoutEffect runs in child components.

notes.title: CSS animation pattern
notes.content: Pair with data-state attribute and CSS @keyframes. Set data-state="open"|"closed" and use data-[state=open]:animate-[...] / data-[state=closed]:animate-[...] for enter/exit animations.

notes.title: Used by
notes.content: Built into DialogShell (shared by DialogContent and CommandPaletteContent) and PopoverContent. Tooltip gets animation via PopoverContent delegation.

parameters.name: open
parameters.description: Whether the content should be visible. When true, mounts immediately. When false, keeps mounted until exit animation completes via onAnimationEnd.

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: Ref to the animated element. When provided, filters bubbling animationend events from child elements. Recommended when the animated element has children with their own CSS animations.

returns.type: { present: boolean; exiting: boolean; onAnimationEnd: (e: AnimationEvent) => void }
returns.description: Object with present flag for conditional rendering and onAnimationEnd callback for the animated element.

properties.description: Whether the element should be in the DOM. Use this for conditional rendering.

properties.description: True during the closing animation phase, after present becomes false but before onAnimationEnd is called.
